title: Heartbeat: Nonprofit Brand Identity Pack
tagline: Elevate your mission with professional, donor-ready designs that inspire trust and action.
description: This comprehensive template pack helps nonprofit organizations communicate their impact with clarity and compassion. Designed for social media, fundraising campaigns, and internal communications, the layout balances emotional storytelling with clean, accessible aesthetics. It empowers teams to maintain brand consistency while focusing resources on their cause. Digital download - no physical item will be shipped.
platform_compatibility: Works in Canva free and Canva Pro
customizability: Easily editable - change colors, fonts, images and text
seo_keywords: nonprofit templates, charity social media, fundraising flyer, NGO branding, volunteer recruitment, impact report, donation campaign, grant proposal, nonprofit marketing, cause marketing
